name: Supremes En Vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts. Cut each in half.
2. Dip the pieces into sour cream.
3. Roll in bread crumbs.
4. Roll up each piece and place in a greased baking pan.
5. Drizzle with melted butter and vermouth.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
Sauce:
1. Prepare sauce using 1 can condensed Cream of Mushroom (or cream of chicken or both) soup.
2. Dilute the soup with half a cup of light cream.
3. Add vermouth and heat until bubbling.
